query:
SELECT l.id, l.title, l.lessonOrder, l.courseId 
FROM lessons l 
WHERE l.courseId = 1 
ORDER BY l.lessonOrder;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT l.id, l.title, l.lessonOrder, l.courseId 
FROM lessons l 
WHERE l.courseId = 1 
ORDER BY l.lessonOrder;
